mapper.sql: address_id, user_id, receiver_name, receiver_mobile, province, city, district, address_detail, postal_code, is_default, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark, del_flag
mapper.select: SELECT FROM jst_user_address WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND del_flag = '0' ORDER BY is_default DESC, update_time DESC, address_id DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE jst_user_address SET receiver_name = #{receiverName}, receiver_mobile = #{receiverMobile}, province = #{province}, city = #{city}, district = #{district}, address_detail = #{addressDetail}, postal_code = #{postalCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, is_default = #{isDefault}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = #{updateTime}, remark = #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR} WHERE address_id = #{addressId} AND user_id = #{userId} AND del_flag = '0'
UPDATE jst_user_address SET del_flag = '2', update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = NOW() WHERE address_id = #{addressId} AND user_id = #{userId} AND del_flag = '0'
UPDATE jst_user_address SET is_default = 0, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND del_flag = '0' AND is_default = 1
UPDATE jst_user_address SET is_default = 1, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = NOW() WHERE address_id = #{addressId} AND user_id = #{userId} AND del_flag = '0'
